properties.name: hte.config.path
properties.description: Path to the engine initialization JSON

properties.name: hte.db.path
properties.description: Local DB file used to persist users, sessions, and bots

properties.name: hte.http.url
properties.description: Base HTTP URL of this exchange instance (used when constructing links in responses/payloads and for test/client configuration)

properties.name: hte.ws.url
properties.description: WebSocket URL clients should use to connect to the exchange socket endpoint

properties.name: hte.admin.username
properties.description: Admin username required to access admin-only HTTP endpoints

properties.name: hte.admin.password
properties.description: Admin password required to access admin-only HTTP endpoints

properties.name: hte.order.max.price
properties.description: Upper bound for incoming limit order prices (values above are clamped)

properties.name: hte.order.min.price
properties.description: Lower bound for incoming limit order prices (values below are clamped)

properties.name: hte.order.max.volume
properties.description: Upper bound for incoming order volumes (values above are clamped)

properties.name: hte.order.min.volume
properties.description: Lower bound for incoming order volumes (values below are clamped)
